post_incentive_overrun_shock_inr_crore.rationale: Plan names up to 15% budget overrun (INR 300 crore) as the stress-test point estimate. Medium uncertainty: bracket ±50% around the named figure to span partial vs. fuller adoption failure.

sme_redesign_shock_inr_crore.rationale: Plan cites INR 400 crore redesign cost if the 50% SME mandate triggers small-firm failure. Medium uncertainty: ±50% spread reflects toolkit-rework scope unknowns.

legal_friction_shock_inr_crore.rationale: Plan states INR 150-300 crore sunk-cost band for state/central labor-law friction; base is the midpoint, low/high are the explicit endpoints.

actual_voluntary_opt_in_rate.rationale: Base centered on the load-bearing 0.75 commitment (DEFAULT, no anchored shift). High uncertainty: voluntary policy pilots commonly land 0.55-0.90 depending on incentive salience and trust.

sme_admin_hours_per_week_actual.rationale: Base centered on the 2.0-hour ASI target (DEFAULT, no named Risk/Issue/Premortem forecasting a gap). Asymmetric upside to 5 hours reflects compliance-overhead overrun risk; 1.5 is a practical floor.

actual_sme_cohort_share.rationale: Base centered on the 50% mandate (DEFAULT, no anchored shift). Low-side spread to 0.35 reflects selection-bias risk if SME MOU signing lags; high capped near 0.6 by cohort balance.
